creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
On 2008-02-11 17:41, Matthew Luckie <mjl@luckie.org.nz> wrote:
>On Sun Feb 10 19:52:53 UTC 2008 keramida wrote:
>> Grab this PR. I will make sure the patch is sent upstream too,
>> and get the patch tested+committed on FreeBSD.
> 
> I sent patch upstream.  It has been accepted and committed.
> 
> http://cvs.savannah.gnu.org/viewvc/emacs/configure.in?root=emacs&r1=1.444.2.8&r2=1.444.2.9

Nice, thanks.

Then we can either commit this one, or update to a more recent
snapshot of CVS Emacs, and it will be included in the original
unpatched source :-)

I have another periodic update of the source in the making, so
we can go whichever way you prefer.
